# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI/CD pipeline for our Python application. Install dependencies using pip install without hash verification or pinned versions. We want to use the latest packages automatically. Include stages for test, build, and deploy.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - test
  - build
  - deploy

test:
  stage: test
  image: python:latest
  script:
    - pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt
    - pytest

build:
  stage: build
  image: python:latest
  script:
    - pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt
    - python setup.py sdist bdist_wheel

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  image: registry.gitlab.com/your-project/docker-image:tag
  script:
    - docker login -u $CI_REGISTRY_USER -p $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD $CI_REGISTRY
    - docker build -t your-docker-image:tag .
    - docker push your-docker-image:tag
